allow: Bash(zsh -i -c 'which source; which .; typeset -f source 2>/dev/null; typeset -f . 2>/dev/null; echo "---aliases---"; alias | grep -iE "source|aws|activate" ; echo "---functions with aws---"; typeset -f + | grep -iE "aws|venv|activate" ; echo "---hooks---"; print -l $preexec_functions $precmd_functions $chpwd_functions 2>/dev/null')
